summary.change: added scene-level switch between projects.list and projects.ledger inside SceneView
summary.user_visible_outcome: project scene pages can switch between list and kanban without changing sidebar navigation

commands.command: bash -lc 'source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh >/dev/null 2>&1 && nvm use 20 >/dev/null && pnpm -C frontend/apps/web typecheck:strict'

notes: based on existing scene split between projects.list and projects.ledger
